## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] TypeScript types are properly defined (no `any` types)

### Security
- [ ] All user inputs are properly sanitized
- [ ] No sensitive data is exposed in logs or error messages
- [ ] Authentication and authorization checks are in place
- [ ] Dependencies have been audited for vulnerabilities

### Performance
- [ ] Code changes do not negatively impact performance
- [ ] Bundle size impact is acceptable
- [ ] Lighthouse scores meet minimum thresholds

### Accessibility
- [ ] Changes meet WCAG 2.2 AA standards
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works correctly
- [ ] Screen reader compatibility verified
- [ ] Color contrast ratios are compliant
